Bash(git -C "C:/Projects/ImgURLConverter" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Google Drive session expiration issues

Problem:
- Uploads were failing with "401 Unauthorized: Invalid session ID"
- Users had to manually reconnect before each upload
- No clear indication when session expired

Solution:
1. Added session verification before upload
   - New verifyGoogleDriveSession\(\) function in background.js
   - Checks session validity before attempting upload
   - Returns clear error message if session invalid

2. Enhanced error handling
   - Detects 401 Unauthorized errors
   - Automatically marks session as disconnected
   - Updates UI to show "Not connected" status
   - Prompts user to reconnect

3. Better error messages
   - "Unauthorized: Invalid session ID. Please reconnect to Google Drive."
   - Helps user understand what action to take

Flow:
1. User attempts upload
2. Extension verifies session with backend
3. If invalid: Show clear error, update UI, prompt reconnect
4. If valid: Proceed with upload

Applies to:
- Upload Img tab \(Google Drive option\)
- Upload Vid tab

Files Changed:
- background.js: Added verifyGoogleDriveSession\(\), enhanced error handling
- popup.js: Auto-detect session errors, update UI state

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Projects/ImgURLConverter" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Google Drive to Convert Tab

Features:
- Added Google Drive option to upload service selector
- Google Drive connection UI in Convert tab
- Connection status display \(Connected/Not connected\)
- Reconnect and Unlink functionality
- Shared OAuth authentication with Upload tabs
- Session verification before conversion

How it works:
1. User selects "Google Drive" from upload service dropdown
2. Google Drive connection UI appears
3. User clicks "Connect to Google Drive" \(if not connected\)
4. Pastes image links to convert
5. Extension downloads images from source
6. Uploads to Google Drive
7. Replaces original links with Google Drive links

Upload Flow:
- Extract image URLs from pasted links
- Download images from source \(including Lightshot\)
- Convert blob to base64 data URL
- Upload to Google Drive via backend
- Generate shareable Google Drive links
- Replace original URLs in output

Files Changed:
- popup.html: Added Google Drive option and connection UI
- popup.js: Added Google Drive logic for Convert tab

Functions Added:
- updateConvertGDriveStatus\(\) - Updates connection status
- handleConvertGDriveConnect\(\) - Handles OAuth connection
- uploadToGoogleDrive\(\) - Uploads blob to Google Drive

Reuses:
- Existing Google Drive OAuth from Upload tabs
- Existing handleGoogleDriveUpload in background.js
- Shared session storage across all tabs

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Projects/ImgURLConverter" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Sync Google Drive connection status across all tabs

Problem:
- Authenticating in Upload Img or Upload Vid didn''t update Convert tab
- Convert tab showed "Not connected" even after OAuth in other tabs
- Connection status only updated on manual interaction

Solution:
1. Added storage change listener
   - Listens for googleDriveConnected and googleDriveSessionId changes
   - Updates all tab status displays when changes detected
   - Works across browser windows and tabs

2. Updated switchTab function
   - Calls updateConvertGDriveStatus\(\) when switching to Convert tab
   - Ensures fresh status display on tab switch
   - Also calls updateApiUI\(\) to show/hide connection UI

3. Added initialization on page load
   - initializeGoogleDriveStatus\(\) runs on popup open
   - Updates all Google Drive status displays
   - Ensures correct state from the start

Flow:
1. User authenticates in any tab \(Upload Img, Upload Vid, or Convert\)
2. OAuth stores session in chrome.storage.local
3. Storage change listener fires in all open popups
4. All tabs update their Google Drive status displays
5. User switches to Convert tab → Status refreshed again

Applies to:
- Convert tab \(shows connected status after auth in other tabs\)
- Upload Img tab \(syncs with other tabs\)
- Upload Vid tab \(syncs with other tabs\)

Files Changed:
- popup.js: Added storage listener, updated switchTab, added initialization

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Projects/ImgURLConverter" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add file monitoring system to Upload Img and Upload Vid tabs

Features:
- Folder selection via File System Access API
- Persistent folder handles using IndexedDB
- 10-second automatic scanning + scan on extension open
- Time-based file filtering \(default: last 20 minutes\)
- User-configurable time filter \(1-1440 minutes\)
- Detected files list with checkboxes for manual selection
- "Uploaded" badge marking for uploaded files
- Uploaded files remain in list with disabled checkboxes
- Refresh button to manually rescan folder
- Integration with existing upload handlers

Upload Img Tab:
- Folder monitoring UI in settings panel
- Supports both manual file selection and detected files
- Uploaded images marked with ✓ Uploaded badge
- Files from both sources can be uploaded together

Upload Vid Tab:
- Folder monitoring UI in settings panel
- Supports both manual file selection and detected files
- Uploaded videos marked with ✓ Uploaded badge
- Prioritizes file input, falls back to detected files

Implementation Details:
- IndexedDB functions: openDB\(\), saveFolderHandle\(\), getFolderHandle\(\)
- Folder scanning: scanFolder\(\) with type and time filtering
- File rendering: renderDetectedFiles\(\) with checkbox generation
- Auto-update functions: updateImageFiles\(\), updateVideoFiles\(\)
- Permission handling: automatic permission requests
- State management: Maps for detected files, Set for uploaded files
- File age calculation: Date.now\(\) - file.lastModified
- Sorting: newest files first \(by lastModified\)

Files Changed:
- popup.html: Added folder monitoring UI to both tabs
- popup.js: Complete file monitoring implementation

User Workflow:
1. Click settings \(⚙️\) in Upload Img or Upload Vid tab
2. Click "Select Folder to Monitor"
3. Choose folder to scan
4. Extension scans every 10 seconds
5. Files appear in "Detected Files" list
6. Check files to upload
7. Click upload button
8. Uploaded files show ✓ Uploaded badge and disabled checkbox
9. Files remain in list for reference

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Projects/ImgURLConverter" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix folder permission error on extension load

Problem:
- Extension threw SecurityError on load when trying to scan folders
- File System Access API requires user gesture to request permissions
- Auto-scanning on page load violated this requirement

Solution:
- Modified scanFolder\(\) to check permission without requesting
- If permission not granted, return empty array \(no error\)
- Modified initializeFileMonitoring\(\) to check permissions first
- If permission expired, show red warning message
- User must click "Select Folder" button again to regrant permission

Behavior:
- On first load after browser restart: Shows "Permission needed - please reselect folder"
- User clicks "Select Folder to Monitor" button
- Permission granted through user gesture
- Monitoring starts automatically
- Files appear in detected files list

Files Changed:
- popup.js: Permission checking logic in scanFolder\(\) and initialization

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Projects/ImgURLConverter" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Improve file monitoring: preserve checkbox states and folder info

Problem 1: Checkbox states reset on refresh
- When files refreshed \(auto every 10s or manual\), all checkboxes unchecked
- User had to reselect files after each refresh
- Very frustrating user experience

Solution 1: Preserve checkbox states
- Before re-rendering, capture all checked filenames in a Set
- When rendering, restore "checked" attribute for previously selected files
- Uploaded files remain disabled \(no restoration\)
- Checkboxes now maintain state across refreshes

Problem 2: Folder selection not persisted
- Selected folder forgotten after browser close
- Extension showed "No folder selected" on restart
- User had to reselect folder every time

Solution 2: Save folder information
- Save folder name to chrome.storage.local when selected
- Load folder name on initialization
- Show helpful message: "FolderName - permission needed, click to reselect"
- User knows which folder was selected and why it needs reselection

Implementation Details:
- Modified renderDetectedFiles\(\):
  - Query existing checkboxes before innerHTML replacement
  - Store checked filenames in Set
  - Restore checked state during render if not uploaded
- Modified folder selection handlers:
  - Save folder name to chrome.storage.local
  - Keys: imageFolderName, videoFolderName
- Modified initializeFileMonitoring\(\):
  - Load folder names from chrome.storage
  - Show folder name in permission expired message

User Experience:
- Select files → files stay selected during auto-refresh
- Close extension → reopen → files still selected
- Close browser → reopen → see folder name + reselect prompt
- Upload files → uploaded files disabled, other selections preserved

Files Changed:
- popup.js: Checkbox preservation and folder name persistence

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Projects/ImgURLConverter" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Improve folder permission UX with auto-opening settings

Changes:
- Enhanced permission expired message with warning icon
- Show folder name that needs permission reselection
- Added helpful instruction text below warning
- Auto-open settings panel when permission expired
- Makes it immediately obvious what user needs to do

Behavior:
- On browser restart \(permission expired\):
  - Shows: "⚠️ Permission expired for 'FolderName'"
  - Below: "Click 'Select Folder to Monitor' above to restore"
  - Automatically opens settings panel if on that tab
  - User clicks button, selects same folder, monitoring resumes

- During browser session \(permission valid\):
  - Monitoring continues across extension opens/closes
  - Files refresh every 10 seconds
  - No need to reselect folder

Note: File System Access API permissions expire on browser restart
for security - this is expected browser behavior, not a bug.

Files Changed:
- popup.js: Better permission expired messaging and auto-open settings

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Projects/ImgURLConverter" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add automatic folder picker on permission expiry

Problem:
- User had to manually click "Select Folder" button after browser restart
- Required navigating through folder structure again
- Wanted folder to persist automatically like previous version

Solution:
- Automatically trigger folder picker when permission expires
- Shows "🔄 Restoring 'FolderName'..." message
- Folder picker opens after 500ms delay automatically
- User just needs to click "Select" \(folder remembered by browser\)
- Much faster workflow - single click instead of navigation

Behavior:
- On browser restart with expired permissions:
  - Extension opens folder picker automatically
  - User clicks "Select" on the folder
  - Monitoring resumes immediately
  - Files start appearing within 10 seconds

- If user cancels folder picker:
  - Shows "Folder not restored" message
  - Can click "Select Folder to Monitor" to try again

- If not on correct tab:
  - Shows "Will restore when you switch to [tab name]"
  - Auto-triggers when user switches to that tab

Files Changed:
- popup.js: Auto-trigger folder picker on permission expiry

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Projects/ImgURLConverter" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Change to manual refresh workflow for folder monitoring

Problem:
- Automatic folder picker was confusing
- User wanted simpler workflow
- No need for automatic 10-second scanning

Solution:
- Removed automatic folder picker on page load
- Removed 10-second auto-refresh interval
- Folder path persists in chrome.storage
- User clicks Refresh button when they want to load files
- Refresh button handles permission restoration automatically

New Workflow:
1. User selects folder once \(settings\)
2. Extension remembers "Telegram Desktop"
3. Extension opens → Shows: "Telegram Desktop - Click Refresh to load files"
4. User clicks Refresh button
5. If permission expired: requestPermission\(\) called automatically
6. Files load from remembered folder
7. No folder picker unless user wants to change folder

Benefits:
- Much clearer UX
- User controls when to scan for files
- Folder persists across browser sessions
- Permission request happens on user action \(Refresh click\)
- No confusing automatic popups

Files Changed:
- popup.js: Manual refresh workflow, permission request on Refresh

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Projects/ImgURLConverter" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Improve Google Drive auth error handling and update branding

Features:
- Enhanced error detection for Google Drive session expiration
- Shows clear alert dialogs when authentication fails
- Prompts user to reconnect in Settings with visual guidance
- Stops upload/conversion process immediately on auth error
- Extended error message display time \(8 seconds for errors\)

Error Handling Improvements:
- Convert Tab: Detects "Unauthorized" and "Invalid session" errors
- Upload Img Tab: Stops batch upload and shows reconnection alert
- Upload Vid Tab: Shows clear error message and alert dialog
- All tabs: Update connection status UI automatically

Branding Updates:
- Changed extension name from "Image Link Converter" to "LinkCaster"
- Updated description: "Upload images and videos to cloud + convert links from one host to another"
- Added new extension_icon.png for better visual identity

Technical Changes:
- Enhanced showStatus\(\) function with visibility guarantee
- Added GOOGLE_DRIVE_SESSION_EXPIRED error code for flow control
- Improved processUrls\(\) to stop on session expiration
- Added native alert\(\) dialogs for critical auth errors
- Error propagation through async upload chains

Files Changed:
- manifest.json: Name, description, and icon updates
- popup.js: Auth error handling across all tabs

User Experience:
- Clear, impossible-to-miss error messages
- Immediate feedback when session expires
- Guided reconnection flow
- No wasted time uploading when not authenticated

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
